title: How to Tune a Guitar
description: Learn how to tune your guitar step by step using an online tuner, tuning fork, or reference pitch.

title: Guitar String Frequencies
description: Complete reference chart of standard guitar string frequencies in Hz for all six strings.

title: Standard Guitar Tuning
description: Everything you need to know about standard EADGBE guitar tuning, including history and common uses.

title: Drop D vs Standard Tuning
description: Compare Drop D and standard guitar tuning to find which is right for your playing style and genre.
